description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:latest Docker image. Define two stages: build and execute. Add a build job that runs /usr/lib/jvm/java-8-openjdk-amd64/bin/javac HelloWorld.java, stores the compiled HelloWorld.* files as artifacts, and runs in the build stage. Add an execute job that runs /usr/lib/jvm/java-8-openjdk-amd64/bin/java HelloWorld in the execute stage, with no caches or special triggers.
